# Cody Arcade Tilemap RAM Dump (Task 3)

## 3A. MAME Debugger Invocation and Commands

- Command line used:
  - `GENESISTAN_ROOT=/home/tighe/projects/rastan-genesis mame rastan -rompath roms -debug -debugger none -video none -sound none -nothrottle -skip_gameinfo -autoboot_script /tmp/collect_rastan_arcade.lua -seconds_to_run 20`
- Debug/runtime collection method used in this run:
  - Lua write tap: `prog:install_write_tap(0xC00000, 0xC03FFF, ...)`
  - Memory reads: `prog:read_u16(...)` for full BG RAM and 4x4 extraction
- Interactive debugger console commands: none (collection was scripted under `-debug`).
